summary: Documentation-only single-line edit to overview.md is factually accurate against the user-spec on every claim (hotkey b, PG 14-18, pg_stat_checkpointer on PG 17+, single-row, TUI-only/NotRecordable in 0.11.0). The stale 'pg_stat_bgwriter — background writer stats' line that falsely implied pre-existing support is removed, and no other lines or files were touched by this change.

suggestions.suggestion: The new entry is noticeably longer (one densely-packed line with four semicolon-separated caveats) than its neighbors, which carry at most a short parenthetical (e.g. the pg_stat_wal line: '(PG 14+; reduced schema in PG 18)'). It reads slightly more like a mini-spec than a high-level overview bullet. Optionally trim to the essentials (e.g. drop the explicit '0.11.0' version pin or fold 'single-row' into the parenthetical) to better match the section's terseness.
suggestions.benefit: Tighter consistency with surrounding bullets and a more scannable overview section.
